description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
More machine than man.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
Claws which retract from your knuckles which is a Heavy Melee Weapon. Can be concealed.
A monowire with a serrated hook is fired from a wrist-mounted medium pistol, its feed reeling in automatically after a miss.
A concealable one-handed Ranged Weapon. Can't hold anything with this hand while activated.
Claws which retract from your knuckles which is a Heavy Melee Weapon. Can be concealed.
Basic ammo, nothing special.
Basic ammo, nothing special.
The first time a psycho is shot each round, they can immediately fire back once (assuming visibility).

The psycho ignores the penalty imposed by an opponent taking half cover, and can shoot through “light” cover (anything that would be destroyed after taking 10 or less damage) as though it weren’t there.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
Can be fired once a turn without using an action.
Double ablation to armor.
Can be fired once a turn without using an action.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.
Installed into one of the psycho's two base cyberarms.
Double ablation to armor.
No immediate damage. If hit DV15 Resist Torture/Drugs Check. On a fail 3d6 damage to HP. No Ablation.
Once a round,, when the psycho has failed a check with a DV of 17 or lower, it can choose to pass it instead.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 5/Org Boss - High-level named threats who hold significant hard power, in charge of leading the various orgs found around NC.

Gang-Wide Ability - Aftermarket Sandevistan: At the start of each round of initiative, choose a Maelstrom gang member currently in combat. That gang member goes first, this round. Additionally, when rolling endurance checks for Maelstrom, use the physical skill instead of lowdown.

Ability - No Longer Human - The psycho can dodge bullets using its Physical skill, and ignores the damage inflicted by critical injuries.

Extra Gear - Choose one entry from either the brawler or punisher options, and one of the following:

  • Shoulder-mounted weapon: the psycho gains a shoulder mount with one arm, which has been converted into either a shotgun which fires incendiary shells, or a very heavy pistol which fires armor piercing bullets. It can be fired once a turn without using an action.

  • Popout grenade launcher: one of the psycho’s arms has been fitted with a popout grenade launcher, and the psycho carries one armor piercing grenade, and one biotoxin grenade.

  • Redundant nervous system: once a round, when the psycho has failed a check with a DV of 17 or lower, it can choose to pass that check instead.

Hoh, you think you got what it takes to take down one of the Maelstrom psychoes? Well, color me impressed - it takes a lot of stupid to be that arrogant! You ever see a Maelstrom ripper turn a human body into their art project? Barely human when they’re done. My advice: drop an emp grenade and run.
